signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: Our on-balance sheet 90-day personal loan delinquency rate was 56 basis points, while our annualized personal loan charge-off rate was 4.0%... we do expect a continued normalization towards pre-COVID levels and life of loan losses in the 7% to 8% range.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Our average net interest margin of 6.02% for the quarter, up 3 basis points sequentially and 8 basis points year-over-year... we are committed to providing a top-tier APY in addition to no fees.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We are taking a conservative and pragmatic approach toward our Lending segment revenue, expecting to largely maintain it, given our concerns about the 2024 macro environment... we assume a contraction in GDP in 2024, an increase in unemployment to higher than 5%.
